channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ICE Agent Fatally Shoots Motorist in Maine, Senator Reports
item.description: Sen. Angus King said he urged Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin to ensure a transparent investigation into the shooting.

item.title: Federal immigration authorities involved in Maine fatal shooting
item.description: An Immigration and Customs Enforcement agent was involved in a shooting Monday morning in Biddeford, Maine, federal immigration authorities said.

item.title: Bison charges man, flips him in the air at Yellowstone National Park
item.description: Warning: graphic footage. A bison charged a man at Yellowstone National Park last Friday, flipping him in the air. The incident was captured on video....

item.title: Is there such a thing as being too old to execute? Aging death row inmates are set to die in Florida
